description: Baseline signed AI investigation pack manifest for evidence-first operator workflows.

tools.name: Private access exposure summary
tools.purpose: Summarize public exposure findings with cited Control One rows.
guardrails: Only cite imported findings, action receipts, and SOC case evidence.
Do not recommend production changes without an action-plan approval path.

prompts.name: Exposure triage
prompts.purpose: Create an evidence-first triage note for private-access exposure drift.
guardrails: State uncertainty when source evidence is missing.
Keep remediation recommendations tied to cited findings and rollback plans.
